title: Epitaph On Gay.
content:
Well, then, poor G---- lies under ground!
    So there's an end of honest Jack.
    So little justice here he found,
    'Tis ten to one he'll ne'er come back.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Alexander Pope delivers a powerful performance in "Epitaph On Gay."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
